footer.iselAlt: ISEL — Instituto Superior de Engenharia de Lisboa

hero.taglineStrong: Gamified daily challenges for sustainability and digital literacy.

aiContent.label: AI-Generated Content
aiContent.description: Upload any PDF or URL and our AI instantly builds structured daily challenges tailored to your topic.

adaptiveLearning.label: Adaptive Learning
adaptiveLearning.description: Difficulty adjusts in real-time based on performance, keeping every learner in their optimal learning zone.

gamification.label: Gamification & Peer Review
gamification.description: Streaks, badges, and leaderboards drive motivation while peer review builds deeper collaborative understanding.

sustainability.label: Sustainability Focus
sustainability.description: Purpose-built for sustainability and digital literacy — turning daily micro-learning into lasting behavioural change.

mission.label: Our Mission
mission.heading: Learning that creates
mission.description: Play4Change transforms passive knowledge into active engagement. Our platform makes sustainability education and digital literacy accessible, addictive, and impactful — one daily challenge at a time.

aiContent.title: AI-Generated Content
aiContent.description: Topics are created by educators and enriched by AI — automatically generating quizzes, challenges, and daily tasks tailored to the subject.

adaptiveLearning.title: Adaptive Learning
adaptiveLearning.description: The platform adapts to each learner's pace and performance, ensuring everyone is challenged at the right level — no more one-size-fits-all courses.

gamification.title: Gamification & Peer Review
gamification.description: Daily streaks, leaderboards, and achievement badges keep learners motivated. Peer review tasks develop critical thinking and community knowledge.

sustainability.title: Sustainability Focus
sustainability.description: Topics are curated around the UN Sustainable Development Goals and digital citizenship — empowering the next generation of responsible changemakers.

product.label: How it works
product.heading: From content to knowledge in
product.description: Play4Change bridges the gap between educational content and real behavioral change — turning any resource into an engaging, adaptive learning journey.

step1.title: Educators create topics
step1.description: Admins upload PDF materials or provide URLs. Our AI processes the content and generates a structured learning path with daily challenges.

step2.title: Learners enroll & start
step2.description: Students discover topics, enroll in seconds, and begin receiving one challenge per day — bite-sized tasks that fit any schedule.

step3.title: Progress through challenges
step3.description: Each day brings new quizzes, reflection prompts, and peer tasks. The AI adapts difficulty based on performance to keep learners in the flow state.

step4.title: Earn achievements & grow
step4.description: Complete streaks, earn badges, and climb leaderboards. Community peer reviews build deeper understanding and collaborative learning.

download.label: Get the App
download.heading: Play4Change is
download.description: We're putting the finishing touches on our mobile apps. Be the first to know when they launch — sign up for early access below.

android.storeDescription: Available for Android 8.0 and above. Download from the Google Play Store when it launches.

ios.storeDescription: Available for iOS 15 and above. Find it on the App Store when it launches.
